meaning: n.外套,围巾,包裹,秘密,约束,限制vt.包装,卷,缠绕,包,覆盖,裹,遮蔽,隐藏vi.缠绕,重叠,穿外衣,包起来
examples: We stock a wide range of cards and gift wrap.
It looked as though the plastic wrap was moulded to the fruit.
Store refrigerated food in reusable containers rather than in plastic wrap or aluminium foil.
Wrap-up speaker Cornel West went so far as to compare him to Europeans(ph), and Thomas Hardy.
It includes a detoxifying body wrap and facial mask of thermal mud to exfoliate and hydrate.
